# daytona_current_api_key (Data Source)

Reads metadata for the Daytona API key currently used by the provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_current_api_key" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) API key creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) API key expiration timestamp, when available.
- `id` (String) API key name.
- `last_used_at` (String) API key last-used timestamp, when available.
- `name` (String) API key name.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Permissions assigned to the API key.
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user who owns the API key.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Masked API key value.
